description: Boost your employee engagement with our comprehensive email template designed for hiring managers and human resources teams. Welcome your new employees and set the tone for their first day and first week with an informative yet warm onboarding process. Our email guide provides a clear outline of what new hires should anticipate, allowing them to feel prepared, valued, and excited about joining your team. This email template is not only a tool for communication, but also a strategic approach to foster a positive work environment from day one. Ideal for any organization aiming to enhance their onboarding experience, this template ensures a smooth transition for your new hires.
short_description: Boost employee engagement with our email template for hiring managers and HR teams. Welcome new employees and set the tone for their first day and week with an informative onboarding process. Ideal for enhancing your onboarding experience and fostering a positive work environment.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.

Hi Name,
I hope you are doing well.

I am writing to you to provide you with more details regarding  your Onboarding path at SPREENG.

 
 

This is what you can expect during
your first week:

In the next email we share you some information about the tools & software you will use at SPREENG.

  • On your first day, you will receive your work laptop. Your manager will provide the login credentials.
  • After activating the laptop, just access Gmail via browser, accept its Terms & Conditions, adjust your settings, and you’re ready to go!

ELIJAH

P&C Manager

AISHA

People Business Partner

 

Any questions?

CONTACT US →
